## Decision 908: Fixture -- condition carries an unrecognized 'kind' value (Decided)

**Status:** Decided
**Date:** 2020-01-01

**Reversal conditions:**
This fixture's condition sets `kind: automatic`, which is neither `manual` nor `repo_state` --
the only two values the frozen schema recognizes. Must be flagged MALFORMED.

```yaml reversal-conditions
decision: 908
review_by: 2099-01-01
on_trigger: "re-decide via /plan; update or re-arm this stanza"
conditions:
  - id: bad-kind-condition
    kind: automatic
    description: "kind value outside the {manual, repo_state} schema"
```
